title: Infra - Prior Authorization Platform for Providers
problem: Providers spend excessive time on prior authorization. Multiple payer portals, fax machines, and phone calls create massive administrative burden.
solution: Unified prior authorization platform for providers. Single interface for multiple payers. Automated status tracking and follow-up. Integration with EHR workflows.
technology: Multi-payer integration, EHR integration, workflow automation
varden_fit: HIGH — Unified prior auth for providers is essential. European providers need single interface for multiple insurers.
notes: CONTRARIAN: Provider-side prior auth is painful. European multi-payer systems need unified solutions.
